creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Meant to add above that the watchdog timeout hit re1.  There had been occasional timeouts in the log for a few days but no problems.  Last night there was a series of timeouts in short order and re1 stopped working.  No amount of interface down/up or netif restart re1 helped.  Had to reboot to get it going again.

All the while re1 was not working, re0 was still working fine.
